tool_use.param: [{'content': 'Part 1: Add --id flag to add-objective-node', 'status': 'completed', 'active...[truncated 1006 chars]... issues'}, {'content': 'Submit PR', 'status': 'completed', 'activeForm': 'Submitting PR'}]

session.tool_result: Todos have been modified successfully. Ensure that you continue to use the todo list to track your progress. Please proceed with the current tasks if applicable
session.assistant:
Plan execution complete. Here's a summary of what was implemented:
**PR #9185**: https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/9185
### Changes Made
**Part 1 - `--id` flag on `add-objective-node`** (`add_objective_node.py`, `roadmap.py`): - Added `--id` option for explicit node IDs (e.g., `3.6.1`) - `add_node_to_frontmatter` now accepts `node_id` parameter; when provided, uses it directly instead of auto-assigning - Phase is inferred from the ID prefix when not explicitly given - Duplicate explicit IDs are rejected
**Part 2 - `remove_node_from_frontmatter`** (`roadmap.py`): - New shared function that removes a node by ID from frontmatter YAML - Returns `None` if node not found or parse fails (LBYL pattern)
**Part 3 - `remove-objective-node` exec command** (new file): - Full CLI command: `erk exec remove-objective-node <issue> --node <id>` - Supports `--reason`, `--comment`, `--lessons` for action comment auto-posting - Re-renders comment table after removal
**Part 4 - Fix stale comment YAML** (`roadmap.py`): - `rerender_comment_roadmap` now also syncs the `objective-roadmap` YAML block in the comment (when present) to match the issue body source of truth
**Part 5 - Action comment support** (`objective_post_action_comment.py`, `update_objective_node.py`, `add_objective_node.py`): - Renamed `_format_action_comment` to `format_action_comment` (public API) - Made `pr_number` and `phase_step` optional (nullable) - Empty sections are now dropped from output - Added `--comment` and `--lessons` flags to all three node mutation commands
**Part 6 - Tests**: 36 new/updated tests, all passing. Full suite: 4101 tests pass.
